article.body_preview:
DHAKA, Jan 15, 2023 (BSS) - Bangladesh Bank (BB) today announced 'cautiously accommodative' Monetary Policy Statement (MPS) for the second half of the current fiscal year 2022-23 (H2FY23).

"BB's monetary and credit programs for H2FY23 will pursue a cautiously accommodative policy stance to contain inflationary and exchange rate pressures, support desired economic growth, ensuring the necessary flow of funds to the economy's productive and employment generating activities," said BB Governor Abdu

llm_connections.evidence_quote: BB's monetary and credit programs for H2FY23 will pursue a cautiously accommodative policy stance to contain inflationary and exchange rate pressures,
llm_connections.scope_justification: The quote discusses national-level 'exchange rate pressures', which corresponds to country-level exchange rate volatility described by the feature definition.

llm_connections.evidence_quote: promote import-substituting economic activities and dissuade imports of non-essential commodities to reduce the exchange rate pressure
llm_connections.scope_justification: The article explicitly links a policy to reducing 'exchange rate pressure' at the national level, matching the feature's focus on country-wide exchange rate volatility.
